overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Horizon Forbidden West showing protagonist Aloy walking along a pristine tropical beach with turquoise waters, white sand, and rocky outcrops. The character transitions from the shoreline through rocky areas to vegetated inland zones with tidal pools, showcasing high-fidelity game engine graphics with dynamic lighting and detailed natural environments.

scene_state.functional_zone: tropical beach shoreline with turquoise ocean

events.description: character steps into shallow ocean surf and continues walking through water
moving from wet shoreline sand to drier beach area

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the beach shoreline, briefly wading through shallow waves

entered.detail: vibrant turquoise sea with gentle rolling waves
large gray rock formation with a single tree growing on top
distant mountains partially obscured by atmospheric haze
pristine white sandy beach with footprints

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a tropical beach with the character walking along the shoreline. Turquoise ocean water laps at the white sand on the right, while a distinctive rocky outcrop with a tree stands ahead on the left. The character briefly steps into the shallow surf around 11 seconds before continuing onto drier sand, with misty mountains visible in the distant background.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky beach transition with scattered vegetation

events.description: passing the large rock outcrop as vegetation and trees become prominent

agents.ego_description: walking past the rocky outcrop and through sparsely vegetated beach area toward the tree line

entered.detail: tall green leafy tree standing alone on the beach
clumps of red-colored bushes and grasses
dense line of trees marking the forest edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the rocky outcrop onto drier sand, leaving the ocean behind. Tall trees and red vegetation patches appear on the left as the forest edge becomes visible in the distance. The rocky formation with the tree moves to the right and recedes into the background as the character progresses inland.

scene_state.functional_zone: inland beach with tidal pools and dense vegetation

events.description: entering area with small turquoise pools and colorful flowering vegetation

agents.ego_description: walking through vegetated beach area with colorful plants and small water pools, approaching the forest edge

entered.detail: small pool of turquoise water surrounded by white sand
clusters of purple flowers growing among beach vegetation
thick forest with tall trees and atmospheric mist

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the character exploring an inland beach area featuring small turquoise pools and vibrant purple flowers. The dense forest looms ahead in the center background while rocky hills appear on the right. The character moves through increasingly lush vegetation as the beach transitions toward forest terrain.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement that transitions from a bright, open shoreline into a lush, vegetated inland coastal zone. It begins with the character walking along a white sand beach where turquoise ocean water laps at the shore and misty mountains loom in the distance. As the character moves past a rocky outcrop and leaves the surf behind, the environment shifts toward drier sand where red vegetation and tall trees begin to emerge from the forest edge. The scene then expands into an inland area characterized by small turquoise tidal pools and vibrant purple flowers, with rocky hills appearing to the right. Finally, the camera follows the character as they move through increasingly dense greenery, shifting the landscape from an open beach toward the looming forest terrain.
